sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑτοιμος

- Transliteration: hetoimos

- Phonetic: het-oy'-mos

- Definition:

1. prepare ready

a. of things

1. ready at hand

2. opportune, seasonable

b. of persons

1. ready prepared 1b

c. to do something 1b

d. to receive one coming

- Origin: from an old noun heteos (fitness)

- TDNT entry: 13:44,3

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From an old noun ἕτεος heteos (fitness); adjusted that is ready: - prepared (made) ready (-iness to our hand).
